author: y4rr
content:
Plan: 4-layer conformance suite for ferrotorch-distributions.

Layer 1 — Surface inventory at ferrotorch-distributions/tests/conformance/_surface_inventory.toml.
Distributions to cover: Normal, Bernoulli, Categorical, Beta, Gamma, Exponential, Laplace, Cauchy, Gumbel, HalfNormal, LogNormal, Poisson, StudentT, MultivariateNormal, LowRankMultivariateNormal, Dirichlet, Multinomial, Independent, MixtureSameFamily, OneHotCategorical, RelaxedBernoulli, RelaxedOneHotCategorical, Kumaraswamy, Pareto, VonMises, Weibull, TransformedDistribution.
Infrastructure: Distribution trait, constraints module, transforms module, kl module.

Layer 2 — Fixture script at scripts/regenerate_distributions_fixtures.py. Pin torch==2.11.0. Per-distribution: small parameter sets, seeded sampling (torch.manual_seed(42)), exact log_prob/mean/variance/entropy/cdf/icdf at known input points. Sampling tests cascade_skipped with 'RNG algorithm divergence; analytic moments verified via parameterless tests'.

Layer 3 — Conformance tests split by distribution family:
  - conformance_distributions_continuous.rs (Normal, Cauchy, Laplace, Gumbel, HalfNormal, LogNormal, StudentT, Exponential, Uniform)
  - conformance_distributions_discrete.rs (Bernoulli, Categorical, OneHotCategorical, Poisson, Multinomial)
  - conformance_distributions_multivariate.rs (MultivariateNormal, LowRankMultivariateNormal, Dirichlet, MixtureSameFamily)
  - conformance_distributions_parameterized.rs (Beta, Gamma, Pareto, VonMises, Weibull, Kumaraswamy, RelaxedBernoulli, RelaxedOneHotCategorical, Independent, TransformedDistribution)

Layer 4 — conformance_surface_coverage.rs strict gate.

Dev-deps: serde, serde_json, toml, tempfile added if not present.
